template_en: Continued reliance on ___[化石燃料] will inevitably accelerate ___[環境惡化].
hint: 第一空：煤炭、石油、天然氣的統稱；第二空：描述環境品質整體下滑的過程
explanation: fossil fuels 是能源議題必備詞；environmental degradation 比「對環境的損害」更學術。

template_en: Governments must ___[分配] greater resources toward renewable energy to ensure long-term ___[永續性].
hint: 第一空：比給予或投資更精準的資源分配動詞；第二空：描述一個系統能長期維持下去的特質
explanation: allocate resources 是政策議題固定搭配；sustainability 是環境／經濟議題必備名詞。

template_en: The mass ___[湧入] of commuters has created severe traffic ___[癱瘓] in the city centre.
hint: 第一空：大量人潮同時進入某地的名詞；第二空：城市交通完全停滯、動彈不得的狀態
explanation: a massive influx of 是城市議題高頻搭配；traffic gridlock 比塞車更正式有力。

template_en: Prolonged ___[薪資停滯] has significantly eroded the ___[購買力] of middle-income households.
hint: 第一空：薪資長時間沒有成長的現象；第二空：衡量消費者實際能買多少東西的能力
explanation: wage stagnation 是勞動市場必備詞；erode purchasing power 是固定搭配，用 erode 而不是 reduce。

template_en: The rise of ___[零工經濟] has created ___[結構性挑戰] for traditional labour protection systems.
hint: 第一空：靠接零散案子維生的新型態工作經濟；第二空：根源於體制本身、非表面問題的挑戰
explanation: the gig economy 是當代勞動議題核心詞；structural challenges 比「嚴重問題」高一個層次。

template_en: If left entirely to market forces, the capital market will ___[加劇惡化] ___[階級固化] over time.
hint: 第一空：使問題更嚴重的學術動詞；第二空：描述階層之間固定化、難以流動的社會現象
explanation: exacerbate 是 CLB9 必備動詞；social stratification 比「階級差距」更學術。

template_en: Remote work can ___[緩解] ___[固定營運成本] associated with office rentals and utilities.
hint: 第一空：緩解壓力或負擔的動詞；第二空：租金、水電這類企業的固定支出
explanation: alleviate 搭配 overhead costs 是遠距工作議題的標準句型。

template_en: AI will ___[使] a massive number of current occupations ___[過時的].
hint: 第一空：使某物進入某種狀態的動詞；第二空：因新技術而不再被需要、被取代的形容詞
explanation: render + 受詞 + obsolete 是固定搭配，比「使工作消失」精準有力。

template_en: The ___[擴散] of misinformation has ___[侵蝕] public trust in scientific institutions.
hint: 第一空：某事物大量快速蔓延的名詞；第二空：像水侵蝕岩石般緩慢破壞某樣事物（過去式）
explanation: the proliferation of 是 CLB9 科技議題高頻片語；erode trust 是固定搭配。

template_en: Without regulation, ___[演算法偏見] may ___[加劇] existing inequalities, disproportionately affecting marginalised groups.
hint: 第一空：因訓練資料不均而在系統中產生的系統性偏差；第二空：使已有問題更嚴重的動詞
explanation: algorithmic bias 是 AI 議題必備詞；exacerbate inequalities 是固定搭配。

template_en: The ___[平民化] of information ___[賦權] patients to take a more active role in their health management.
hint: 第一空：讓原本只有少數人才能取得的東西變得人人可及的名詞；第二空：賦予某人主動掌控的能力和權利
explanation: democratization of information 是 CLB9 必備片語；empower 比允許或幫助更有力。

template_en: An overemphasis on ___[標準化測驗] tends to ___[削弱] students' capacity for ___[批判性思考].
hint: 第一空：全國統一評分標準的考試制度；第二空：暗中逐漸削弱某個正向事物；第三空：獨立分析與評估論點的思考能力
explanation: 三個詞組合是教育議題 CLB9 段落的核心句型。undermine 強調漸進式削弱，比 weaken 更學術。

template_en: Schools should ___[培養] ___[求知欲] rather than training students purely for examinations.
hint: 第一空：比發展或訓練更有深度的「培育」動詞；第二空：對知識本身感到好奇、想主動探索的渴望
explanation: cultivate intellectual curiosity 是教育議題 CLB9 必備搭配，展示教育的更高目標。

template_en: Vocational training should be recognised as equally ___[值得肯定的] as academic pathways, helping diversify the skilled ___[勞動力].
hint: 第一空：值得被社會認可與稱讚的形容詞；第二空：整個社會中所有工作人口的統稱
explanation: commendable 替代普通的好；workforce 比「工作者」更學術正式。

template_en: A ___[久坐不動的] lifestyle has been directly linked to rising ___[慢性病] rates and declining life expectancy.
hint: 第一空：整天坐著、缺乏身體活動的形容詞；第二空：長期持續、不容易治癒的疾病類型
explanation: sedentary lifestyle 是健康議題必備搭配；chronic disease 比「長期疾病」更醫學正式。

template_en: Dismissing early symptoms as ___[微不足道的] ailments can lead to dangerous ___[誤診] with severe consequences.
hint: 第一空：輕微到不值得重視的形容詞；第二空：醫生對病情做出錯誤判斷的名詞
explanation: trivial 比「微小的」更精準；misdiagnosis 是健康議題必備詞，強調危險性。

template_en: Investing in ___[預防性醫療] is far more cost-effective than relying on ___[傳聞的] remedies and self-diagnosis.
hint: 第一空：著重在疾病發生前就介入的醫療模式；第二空：只來自個人經驗、缺乏科學實證支持的形容詞
explanation: preventive healthcare 是醫療政策必備詞；anecdotal remedies 強調缺乏實證，是 CLB9 批判句型。

template_en: A purely punitive system that ignores ___[更生] risks driving up ___[再犯率] and deepening social division.
hint: 第一空：幫助犯人改過、重新融入社會的過程；第二空：出獄後再次犯罪的比率
explanation: rehabilitation vs. punishment 是刑事司法議題的核心對比；recidivism 是 CLB9 司法議題必備詞。

template_en: Excessive state control risks creating a ___[保姆國家] that fundamentally ___[侵蝕] individual ___[自主權].
hint: 第一空：形容政府過度干涉人民生活的固定片語；第二空：逐漸侵蝕某樣事物；第三空：個人有權為自己做決定的自主
explanation: nanny state 是批評過度政府干預的標準詞；erode autonomy 是固定搭配。

template_en: Policies that ignore ___[社會流動性] will inevitably ___[削弱] ___[社會凝聚力] over time.
hint: 第一空：個人跨越社會階層向上移動的能力；第二空：暗中逐漸削弱某個正向事物（非「加劇」）；第三空：社會成員之間相互信任凝聚的狀態
explanation: 注意「削弱」和「加劇」的差異：削弱 = 使正向事物變弱；加劇 = 使負向問題更嚴重。

template_en: ___[more and more →] young graduates are choosing vocational training over traditional university degrees.
hint: 一個副詞，表達「越來越」，放句首後面語序不變
explanation: Increasingly 是最常被考的口語升級詞，放句首即可，不需改動後面句子結構。

template_en: Climate change, if left unaddressed, will ___[get worse →] existing economic ___[differences →] between nations.
hint: 第一空：使問題加劇的學術動詞；第二空：強調不公平、結構性差距的名詞
explanation: exacerbate 取代「惡化」；disparities 取代「差距」，強調不公平的結構性本質。

template_en: The government must ___[use →] every available tool to ___[help →] those most vulnerable to automation.
hint: 第一空：比使用更正式的「運用」動詞，也可以指雇用；第二空：不只是幫助，而是賦予對方主動改變自身處境的能力
explanation: employ（運用）比「使用」更正式；empower 強調給予能動性，比「幫助」高一個層次。

template_en: While urban populations ___[激增] throughout the period, rural areas experienced ___[緩慢遲滯的] but steady decline.
hint: 第一空：急速大幅上升的動詞（過去式）；第二空：形容成長速度非常緩慢、像陷在泥沼的形容詞
explanation: surged 比「快速增加」更簡潔有力；sluggish 是 Task 1 必備形容詞，比「緩慢」精準。

template_en: Foreign investment, which ___[佔] nearly 40% of GDP, began to ___[趨於平穩] after the 2015 policy shift.
hint: 第一空：表示某數字佔某比例的固定動詞片語；第二空：成長到某點之後停止、維持水平的動詞
explanation: accounted for 是 Task 1 比例表達必備片語；plateau 比「趨於穩定」更精準，暗示之前有明顯成長。

template_en: If implemented without sufficient planning, this policy might prove ___[反效果的] and ___[加劇] the very inequality it aims to solve.
hint: 第一空：比 useless 高一層，帶有「結果與本意相反」含義的形容詞；第二空：使問題更嚴重的學術動詞，後接受詞
explanation: prove counterproductive 是固定搭配（不說 be counterproductive）；exacerbate the very problems it aims to solve 是 CLB9 反向影響句的萬用結尾，記住整組。

template_en: Both corporations and individuals must ___[優先考量] environmental sustainability ___[高於] short-term convenience.
hint: 第一空：表示「把A置於更重要位置」的動詞，取捨邏輯必備；第二空：一個介系詞，構成固定結構 prioritize A ___ B
explanation: prioritize A over B 是 CLB9 取捨邏輯的萬用句型，取代口語化的「care about A but ignore B」。結構固定，直接背整組。

template_en: If consumers blindly ___[屈服於] a ___[物質主義的] culture, the throwaway mentality will only intensify.
hint: 第一空：表示抵抗不住誘惑而屈服的動詞片語，後接名詞；第二空：形容以物質財富為核心價值觀的形容詞
explanation: blindly succumb to 強調「不加反思地屈服」；materialistic 比 money-driven 或 consumer-oriented 更精準，描述一種以物質定義成功的文化取向。

template_en: Empowering citizens with stable housing will ___[培育] a healthier, more ___[具凝聚力的] society for future generations.
hint: 第一空：比 create 或 build 更有「逐步培育」含義的動詞；第二空：描述社會成員緊密連結、不分裂的形容詞，來自 cohesion
explanation: foster a cohesive society 是 CLB9 收尾的高頻語塊；cohesive 源自 social cohesion（社會凝聚力），這兩個詞要一起記。

template_en: The real challenge ___[關鍵不在於] whether to implement this policy, but ___[而在於] how resources can be equitably distributed.
hint: 第一空：CLB9 收尾的升維公式核心，表達「挑戰的本質不是...」，3個詞；第二空：承接 but 的單一介系詞，完成「不是X，而是Y」的對照結構
explanation: The real challenge lies not in X, but in Y 是 CLB9 收尾的升維模板，把討論從表面選擇推向更深層問題。lies 是動詞（位於、在於），不是「說謊」。

template_en: By treating housing as a basic ___[人民應有的權利], governments take ___[積極主動的干預] rather than waiting for crises to worsen.
hint: 第一空：指在道德或法律上本應享有的事物，最簡單的一個詞；第二空：描述主動出擊而非被動回應的政策行動，兩個詞
explanation: treat X as a basic right 是政策論點的有力框架；proactive intervention 是 CLB9 政策議題的核心語塊，比 active measures 更學術。

template_en: In traditional classrooms, students learn to ___[分配任務] and work as a ___[團結一致的力量], skills that virtual platforms struggle to replicate.
hint: 第一空：把工作責任分派給不同成員的動詞片語，兩個詞；第二空：形容團隊方向一致、緊密合作的固定名詞片語，兩個詞
explanation: allocate tasks 是分工合作的精準用詞（比 divide work 更學術）；work as a unified force 是 CLB9 課堂互動的萬用語塊，整組記。

template_en: Governments must enforce proper ___[廢棄物後處理] for consumer goods, ensuring the entire ___[生命週期] of products does not burden the planet.
hint: 第一空：描述產品使用結束後如何負責任地處置的管理機制，三個詞；第二空：從生產製造到最終廢棄，涵蓋一個產品完整存在過程的名詞
explanation: end-of-life management（或 disposal）是循環經濟必備詞彙；the entire lifecycle of these products 是 Day 17 練到的語塊，兩者一起出現在廢棄物議題最有力。

template_en: ___[Point 萬用開頭] standardised testing has done more harm than good to students' long-term intellectual development.
key_answer: A compelling case can be made that
hint: CLB9 Point 句的萬用開頭，取代 I think / It is clear that。共 7 個字。
explanation: [Point 開頭] A compelling case can be made that... 表示「有充分理由支持以下觀點」，比 I believe 高兩個層次，且不帶主觀色彩，更學術。整串背起來直接用。

template_en: The widening income gap between urban and rural populations ___[值得嚴肅對待], as it threatens long-term social stability.
hint: 動詞片語，表示某議題重要到必須認真對待。warrants = 值得、需要。共 3 個字。
explanation: [Point 點出重要性] warrants serious consideration 是 CLB9 點出議題份量的固定語塊，比 is important / needs attention 強很多。主詞可以是任何社會問題。

template_en: The surge in youth unemployment ___[可歸因於] two converging forces: rapid automation and an education system misaligned with market needs.
hint: CLB9 Explain 句的歸因公式，比 is caused by 更學術。共 4 個字。
explanation: [Explain 歸因] can be attributed to 是解釋根本原因的標準句型。後面接名詞或名詞片語，不接子句（接子句用 the fact that）。整串記。

template_en: When workers are displaced without retraining support, this ___[必然導致] structural unemployment, ___[進而引發] a broader erosion of the middle class.
key_answer: inevitably leads to / consequently giving rise to
hint: 第一空：強調結果必然發生的動詞片語，3 個字；第二空：承接前句、描述連鎖後果的分詞構句，4 個字
explanation: [Explain 連鎖因果] inevitably leads to 強調必然性；consequently giving rise to 是分詞構句，把兩個因果連成一氣，避免重複用 and / which。整組是 CLB9 解釋段的連環炮。

template_en: ___[引入有力例子的萬用句首] Finland, where educational reform prioritising critical thinking over rote learning has consistently produced top-ranking graduates.
key_answer: A striking example of this is
hint: Example 段的萬用開頭，比 For example 強很多。striking = 令人印象深刻的。共 6 個字。
explanation: [Example 引例] A striking example of this is + 地名/人名/事件，是 CLB9 引入具體例子最乾淨的句式。striking 強調這個例子特別有說服力，不能換成 good 或 clear。

template_en: ___[引用研究的萬用句首] countries investing heavily in preventive healthcare ultimately spend less on acute medical treatment per capita.
hint: 引用研究佐證的固定句首，consistently 強調結論跨多項研究都成立。共 5 個字。
explanation: [Example 引研究] Studies have consistently shown that 是 IELTS 引用數據/研究的萬用句首。consistently 是關鍵字，表示「不只一次、跨研究都這樣」，去掉它就降一個等級。

template_en: ___[推向更大意義的升維句首], this reflects a deeper question — whether technological progress should serve ___[利潤邏輯] or human well-being.
key_answer: Beyond the immediate impact / profit motives
hint: 第一空：Link 段的升維開頭，從直接影響推向更大意義，4 個字；第二空：描述以商業利益為優先考量的名詞片語，2 個字
explanation: [Link 升維] Beyond the immediate impact 是 CLB9 Link 句把論點從表面推向象徵意義的固定起手式；profit motives 比 making money 更學術，指驅動決策的利潤動機。

template_en: ___[讓步承認], stricter surveillance may deter crime in the short term. ___[反駁：但這忽略了] mass monitoring fundamentally erodes civil liberties.
key_answer: Admittedly / However, this overlooks the fact that
hint: 第一空：CLB9 讓步詞首選，比 Although 更誠懇，1 個字；第二空：反駁讓步的學術套語，6 個字
explanation: [Concession + Counter] Admittedly 開讓步，However, this overlooks the fact that 緊接反駁——這是 CLB9 讓步段的黃金配對，整組記。overlooks 比 ignores 更客觀，暗示對方不是惡意而是視野有限。

template_en: ___[強調關鍵發現的倒裝句首] that despite decades of gender equality legislation, the wage gap ___[頑固持續存在] in virtually every sector.
key_answer: What is particularly noteworthy is / persists
hint: 第一空：CLB9 強調句的倒裝開頭，比 importantly 更有焦點感，5 個字；第二空：描述問題長期存在、難以消除的不及物動詞，1 個字
explanation: [Emphasis] What is particularly noteworthy is 是倒裝強調句，把焦點凝聚在最關鍵的發現上。persists 是 CLB9 強調問題持續性的動詞（問題 persists，不說 problem continues to exist）。

template_en: ___[結論的最終判斷], the most effective solutions to urban congestion lie not in punitive measures, but in redesigning cities to ___[以人為本].
hint: 第一空：結論段最常用的收尾詞，表示「歸根結底」，1 個字；第二空：描述把人的需求放在設計核心的動詞片語，3 個字
explanation: [Conclusion] Ultimately 是結論段首選收尾詞，比 In conclusion / To sum up 更流暢自然；prioritise human needs（或 centre on human needs）是城市規劃論點的升維結尾，把討論從技術層面推向價值層面。

template_en: The question is therefore not ___[是否要管制社群媒體], but ___[是否有足夠的政治意志] to enforce such regulation without compromising freedom of expression.
key_answer: whether to regulate social media / whether there is sufficient political will
hint: 第一空：CLB9 結論升維的前半，把問題從「是否做」轉向更深層，5 個字；第二空：完成升維、指出真正挑戰的後半，6 個字
explanation: [Conclusion 最高境界] The question is therefore not whether X, but whether Y 是 CLB9 頂級收尾——不直接給答案，而是把討論昇華為更深層的問題。political will（政治意志）是政策議題的高頻詞，表示執行決心，不是能力問題。

template_en: Imposing a ___[全面禁令] on private vehicles is ___[不切實際的] without adequate public transit infrastructure.
note: blanket ban = 一刀切的全面禁令（政策禁令首選）；impractical = 不可行的（比 impossible 更精準）

template_en: Rather than a blanket ban, governments should ___[部署額外接駁車] during ___[尖峰時段] to ___[紓解交通瓶頸].
key_answer: deploy additional commuter shuttles / peak hours / relieve this bottleneck
note: deploy = 調度/部署實體資源（車輛、人員）；commuter shuttles = 通勤接駁車；relieve the bottleneck 比 solve the traffic problem 精準
distractors: allocate commuting buses / busy time / solve the traffic
provide more buses / rush time / reduce the jam
add transport vehicles / peak time / fix congestion

template_en: Such a drastic policy would ___[對日常生活造成嚴重干擾] and effectively ___[主宰人們的行程].
key_answer: cause severe disruptions to daily life / dictate people's schedules
note: cause disruptions to（造成干擾）是固定搭配；dictate = 主宰/強制規定（比 control 更學術有力）
distractors: induce severe interruption to life / influence people's time
bring severe problems to daily schedule / control people's routes
create difficult disruption of life / restrict people's choices

template_en: As AI and ___[自動化系統] are increasingly ___[整合進] the workflow, professionals are freed from ___[日常行政瑣事].
key_answer: automated systems / integrated into / mundane administrative tasks
note: automated（自動化的）不是 automatic（自動的）；integrated into = 被整合進；mundane administrative tasks = 已在vocab庫
distractors: automatic systems / imported into / boring office work
automation systems / implemented in / daily admin jobs
AI systems / involved into / ordinary tasks

template_en: An ___[過度依賴] on AI may expose organisations to ___[勒索軟體攻擊], ___[使營運完全停擺].
key_answer: overreliance / ransomware attacks / bringing operations to a complete standstill
note: overreliance on = 對…的過度依賴；ransomware attacks = 勒索軟體攻擊；bring to a standstill = 使陷入停擺（比 stop 更學術）
distractors: over-dependency / hacker attacks / stopping all operations
excessive reliance / cyber attacks / causing complete shutdown
overuse / malware / making systems fail completely

template_en: Governments must ___[承擔責任] and implement ___[有針對性的介入措施] rather than imposing ___[僵化一刀切的] blanket bans.
key_answer: shoulder their responsibilities / targeted interventions / rigid one-size-fits-all
note: shoulder responsibilities（承擔責任）比 take responsibilities 更學術；targeted interventions = 已在vocab；rigid one-size-fits-all = 已在vocab
distractors: take their responsibilities / general measures / strict uniform
carry their obligations / focused actions / inflexible standard
bear their duties / targeted solutions / one-sided blanket
